---
title: "Russell Goebel"
---

I'm a statistician with a PhD from Boston University. I work on Bayesian spatial modeling and have spent several years doing applied consulting across health, life sciences, and other domains.

This site is where I write about statistics and whatever else I'm thinking about.

---

:::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .home-card}
### Recent Writing
- [A kriging competition](posts/kriging-competition/)
- [Area-to-area kriging with basis functions](posts/kriging-lindgren-sar/)
- [Kriging is Bayesian Linear Regression](posts/kriging-gp-equivalence/)

[All writing →](posts.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .home-card}
### Publications
- [Depression & anxiety in autistic adults](https://doi.org/10.5014/ajot.2023.050108)
- [Functional dependence & COVID-19](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jamda.2023.11.012)
- [Neuromodulators for chronic cough](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.amjoto.2023.103815)
- [National park visitation](https://doi.org/10.1002/for.2962)

[Full CV →](cv.qmd)
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .home-card}
### Software
- [VisitorCounts](https://cran.r-project.org/package=VisitorCounts) — CRAN
- [fastblm](https://github.com/RussJGoebel/fastblm) — GitHub
- [spatintegrate](https://github.com/RussJGoebel/spatintegrate) — GitHub
:::

::::
